title: Santa Claus Christmas Novelty Red Present Sack – Large Reusable Polyester Santa Gift Bag 62cm – Festive Holiday Sack for Christmas Presents
features: Cheerful Santa Claus Design – Add festive fun to your Christmas celebrations with this bright red present sack featuring a joyful Santa Claus print.
Large Size for Plenty of Gifts – Measuring approx. 62cm x 50cm, this spacious sack is perfect for holding presents of various shapes and sizes.
Reusable & Durable – Made from strong polyester material, this Santa gift sack can be used year after year as an eco-friendly alternative to disposable bags.
Perfect for Christmas Morning Magic – Ideal for Santa deliveries, festive displays, children’s gifts, and creating excitement under the Christmas tree.
Lightweight & Easy to Store – Folds flat when not in use, making it simple to pack away with your Christmas decorations.
description: Sold: Single Approx size: 62cm x 50cm / 24.4 in x 20 in Material: Polyester
